title: Signal Jammer #1
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #1

On top of the air traffic control tower. Use a helicopter or other flying vehicle to reach it.

title: Signal Jammer #2
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #2

On top of the bridge The Signal Jammer is located on the Northeast side of the bridge at the top of the Southeast bridge tower. It is only viewable from the Northwest, and the best place to shoot it is from the middle of the bridge, between the towers on the Northeast side against the fence.

title: Signal Jammer #3
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #3

On the Maze Bank logo of the arena. The Signal Jammer is located on the Northeast side of the Arena between Maze and Bank on the building. You can shoot it from anywhere Northeast of the Arena.

title: Signal Jammer #4
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #4

Cypress Flats Industrial Estate - next to the radio tower.

title: Signal Jammer #5
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #5

On the 'Safety First' logo on the ship. The easiest place to shoot it is from under the container crane near the front of the ship.

title: Signal Jammer #6
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #6

On the tall water tank It is located on the West side of the tower. The best place to shoot it is from under/near the power line tower to the West of the water tank.

title: Signal Jammer #7
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #7

On top of the building on the west side. The best place to shoot it from is the safety area just after the entrance barrier ends on the highway below.

title: Signal Jammer #25
popupHtml:
Signal Jammer #25

On the south side of the southernmost red-and-white chimney. The best place to shoot the jammer is around the building with graffiti on it, just northeast of the propane tank storage area.
